app_description.message: Make web pages printer-friendly, convert to PDFs, or take screenshots. Remove ads for clean pages ready to print or save as PDFs.

app_name.message: PrintFriendly - Print, PDF, and Screenshot Web Pages

blocked_by_extension.message: PrintFriendly might be blocked by another extension you have installed, like an ad blocker. Please temporarily disable your other extensions and try to create a PDF again.

capture_failed.message: Full-page screenshot isn’t possible on this site.

capture_failed_descr.message: Some websites use frames or dynamic elements that prevent a complete screenshot. Please try another site.

capturing_desc.message: Please wait, the screenshot will be ready in a moment.

choose_paper_size.message: Choose your preferred paper size for PDFs.

choose_save_method.message: Choose how to save this page

current_view_screenshot_desc.message: Capture only the visible part of the page.

default_mode_checkbox.message: Remember my selection and skip this step next time.

default_mode_checkbox_descr.message: You can change this later in Settings.

default_mode_desc.message: Choose the action that should be automatically selected when you click the extension button.

dont_like_printfriendly_description.message: Your feedback shapes what we build and how we improve. Got a second to tell us how we can do better?

dont_like_printfriendly_title.message: Thanks for giving us a shot.

download_directory_description.message: Specify a folder inside your Downloads directory where you’d like your PDFs and images to go. If you leave it blank, they’ll just go into Downloads. Stick to letters, numbers, dashes, underscores, and slashes (other characters will be removed).

download_warning_close_tab.message: Please close the current PrintFriendly window before starting a new one.

downloading_new_tab.message: PDF downloading in a new tab.

email_sent_error_message.message: We couldn't send your email. Please try again later.

email_sent_success_message.message: Your email has been sent successfully.

enable_yt_playback_pref_descr.message: Allow YouTube videos to play inline when clicked

file_access_description.message: Please go to your browser's extension settings and enable "Allow access to file URLs", so the extension can access this page.

firefox_upload_info_description.message: Firefox automatically closes popups when you select a file. To keep your workflow smooth, we'll open a new window where you can upload your file and choose conversion options.

floating_button_pref_descr.message: Show a button to easily access PrintFriendly.

full_page_screenshot_desc.message: Capture the webpage as it appears with ads, etc.

image_size_pref_desc.message: Set the size of images when viewing pages with the extension.

image_upload_file_too_large.message: Image file is too large. Please select an image smaller than 5MB.

like_printfriendly_p2_description_chrome.message: Would you be willing to review PrintFriendly on the Chrome Web Store?

like_printfriendly_p2_description_edge.message: Would you be willing to review PrintFriendly on the Microsoft Edge Add-ons website?

like_printfriendly_p2_description_firefo.message: Would you be willing to review PrintFriendly on the Firefox Add-ons Store?

like_printfriendly_p2_description_safari.message: Would you be willing to review PrintFriendly on the Safari Extension Store?

optional_cookie_permission_descr_line1.message: To enable sign-in, please click “Allow” on the next screen.

optional_cookie_permission_descr_line2.message: This permission lets the PrintFriendly extension confirm when you’re logged in to PrintFriendly.com, so we can sync your account with the extension.

optional_cookie_permission_descr_line3.message: We never collect your browsing history or data from other websites.

optional_downloads_permission_descr_line.message: To save files to a specific folder, please click “Allow” on the next screen.
This permission lets the PrintFriendly extension download your PDFs and images directly to your chosen location.

optional_host_permission_descr.message: To make the floating button work, we need permission to view and change content on websites:

optional_host_permission_footer.message: To enable, please click Allow on the next screen.

optional_host_permission_item_1.message: This is optional and not required to use PrintFriendly.

optional_host_permission_item_2.message: You can turn this off anytime in settings.

optional_host_permission_item_3.message: We don’t store any of your browsing data.

optional_permission_descr.message: This website uses iframes, which limit our ability to capture the entire page. To take a full-page screenshot, we need additional permission. After closing this message, please click “Allow” to proceed.

pdf_file_downloaded.message: Your PDF file has been downloaded.

popup_delete_mode_description.message: Click to delete one section. Drag to select and delete multiple.

printer_friendly_desc.message: Remove ads and navigation from web pages.

resolve_issue.message: and we will help you resolve the issue.

safari_custom_footer_desc.message: Safari may show "safari-web-extension://" in the footer when you print. Enable this to show the real site URL on the page. (When printing, uncheck "Print headers and footers" in Safari.)

safari_description.message: Convert web pages to PDFs or screenshots. Clean, ad-free pages ready to print or save.

save_as_description.message: Automatically open a "Save As" dialog when you download PDFs or screenshot images. If your browser is already set to ask where to save files, that setting wins.

screenshot_restriction_message.message: PrintFriendly works on most websites, making it easy to create cleaner, printer-friendly pages and screenshots. However, certain pages—like browser settings, extension stores, and other restricted areas—are off-limits due to browser policies. Please contact us if you have any questions.

show_context_menu_pref.message: Show PrintFriendly in the right-click context menu.

show_context_menu_pref_descr.message: When enabled, you can access PrintFriendly directly from your browser’s context menu.

show_download_complete_descr.message: When enabled, a confirmation window appears after your PDF is downloaded, with quick actions for downloading again or converting, editing, or signing.

show_float_button_on_articles_only.message: Show floating button only on article pages

show_float_button_on_articles_only_pref_.message: Enable this option to display the floating PrintFriendly button only on pages that appear to be news articles or blog posts.

signin_required_descr.message: To use PDF compression, please sign in to your PrintFriendly account.

small_images_pref_descr.message: Small images are usually hidden since they’re often not useful when printing or saving to PDF. Turn this setting on if you’d like to see them.

start_download_pdf_subtitle.message: Please don't close your browser. This might take a minute.

still_does_not_work.message: If it still does not work, please contact us at

strict_security_settings.message: We’re sorry, but this page on {{domainName}} has strict security settings (Content Security Policy) that prevent PrintFriendly from working.

strict_security_settings_support.message: For more details or support, please contact us at

strict_security_unsupported_page.message: Page is not supported by PrintFriendly

text_size_pref_desc.message: Set the size of text when viewing pages with the extension.

timed_out_pdf.message: PrintFriendly may have timed out while creating the PDF. It may have been too large for our system to handle.

turn_off_delete.message: Turn Delete off to click links.

unable_to_generate_pdf.message: We were unable to generate a PDF for this page.

unauthorized_email_subtitle.message: You need a free PrintFriendly account to email articles. Please sign in to continue.

upload_file_description.message: Compress, convert, merge, or edit PDFs

uploading_file_warning.message: Please don’t close your browser. This might take a while.

when_to_show_again.message: When should we show this again?

which_option_best.message: Which option is best for me?
